{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230150280B9199BA2B109414DF85"}"},"total":4},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7349923108627661630","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"哇塞，这部小说怎么那么的好看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1711290659,"group_id":"7302379083583720448","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我是无敌操作手，擅长各种第五角色","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzQfLPV5A4AVLcEIUzYwXkQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4897c24ff19c4b11b42c94b2a4ffdc54~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790972&x-signature=GsgGBxyCAjxKhqcOHtwW8YwQpU4%3D","user_id":"946057181660302","user_name":"神本无名"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"946057181660302","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1756828849,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7302379083583720448","book_info":{"abstract":"【架空文，幻想文，不后宫，不套路，不无敌，不系统，不无脑，爽文但不会一直爽】
祂们都消失了，祂们都消失了......
沉睡，沉睡......
当我与克苏鲁融合之时，便无法逃脱追杀的命运。
在这个世界上，正义之人往往被视为傻瓜，因为他们总是坚持自己的原则，而不顾及其他人的利益，往往过于理想化，无法看清现实的真面目。
你们的思维和记忆对外界是全透明的，像一本放在公共场所的书或者说是在广场上放映的电影，完全暴露，可以从外界一览无遗。
当你们面对面交流时，所交流的一切都是真实的，不可能欺骗不可能撒谎。一个思想全透明的生物，会产生怎样的变化，怎样的政治，你们没有计谋，不可能伪装。原来这就是“克苏鲁”盲目痴愚，自认为是填补缺陷和劣势的完美生物。
这个世界是怎样，或许我找不到答案，但我想要了解。
世间疾苦，我没有救赎。
每个人心里都有一头怪兽，那一天我杀死了弱小的自己，而新的我就此重生。
我终将成为这个世界的最强者，一切终焉的源头，终结众神的时代！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o9bd8e6d5c3553b2a641757c45c30a39e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"芒果骑士","author_id":"","book_id":"7302379083583720448","book_name":"我与克苏鲁的弑神记","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7302802801170743808","read_count":"2","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"241964"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"116","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,克苏鲁","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o9bd8e6d5c3553b2a641757c45c30a39e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779385828&x-signature=faRulrJ2TN59IBnP9uOkG6iZoSI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"963651177284951","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"13"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230150280B9199BA2B109414DF85"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读34分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2010,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7348783673139774270","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"基本很悬了，大概是以前黄金三章的时候有问题后面虽然改了但是没得流量了。番茄书都 沉睡，沉睡......
当我与克苏鲁融合之时，便无法逃脱追杀的命运。
在这个世界上，正义之人往往被视为傻瓜，因为他们总是坚持自己的原则，而不顾及其他人的利益，往往过于理想化，无法看清现实的真面目。
你们的思维和记忆对外界是全透明的，像一本放在公共场所的书或者说是在广场上放映的电影，完全暴露，可以从外界一览无遗。
当你们面对面交流时，所交流的一切都是真实的，不可能欺骗不可能撒谎。一个思想全透明的生物，会产生怎样的变化，怎样的政治，你们没有计谋，不可能伪装。原来这就是“克苏鲁”盲目痴愚，自认为是填补缺陷和劣势的完美生物。
这个世界是怎样，或许我找不到答案，但我想要了解。
世间疾苦，我没有救赎。
每个人心里都有一头怪兽，那一天我杀死了弱小的自己，而新的我就此重生。
